title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 353.010 - Citation of chapter
text:
353.010.  Citation of chapter. — This chapter shall be known and may be cited and referred to as "The Urban Redevelopment Corporations Law".
(L. 1943 p. 751 § 1, A.L. 1945 p. 1242, A.L. 1969 S.B. 373, A.L. 1976 H.B. 1369, A.L. 1988 H.B. 1738, A.L. 1993 H.B. 566 merged with S.B. 376)
